paragraphs.text: Senior Data Scientist with {yearsTotal} in data and analytics, including {yearsDS} in data science. I have a proven track record of building and deploying production-grade data science solutions at scale — delivering measurable impact like $1.9M in fraud savings, real-time churn prediction for 500K+ users, and high-accuracy recommendation systems.
I work across the full ML lifecycle — from {phase1} and {phase2} to {phase3}, deployment, and monitoring — with a focus on turning models into reliable services that ship.
My toolkit centers on {tool1}, {tool2}, {tool3}, and scalable data pipelines — and I'm equally comfortable making the case for an ML system to a stakeholder as I am tuning its features.
